'''SoroSuub Facility''' was a manufacturing plant on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], owned and operated by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. Prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it also served as a [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] circuit as part of SoroSuub's sponsorship of the [[Galactic Trials]].

The [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] on Sullust did not provide breathable air, so the facility was built underground with a manufactured [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] supply. The Podrace track wound through the facility and into [[Glass/Legends|glass]] tubes protruding from the exterior. SoroSuub was the first of Sullust's two Podracing circuits and [[Shrivel Braittrand]] was the track favorite.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
